description: NotebookLM is Google's AI notebook product for working with uploaded sources and generating summaries, conversations, and audio outputs. The public developer-facing integration documented for it is the NotebookLM Enterprise API within Google Cloud's Gemini Enterprise/Discovery Engine platform.
summary: NotebookLM on notebooklm.google exposes documented REST API methods for NotebookLM Enterprise on Google Cloud; no public GraphQL, MCP, or first-party CLI surface was found.
